Class NoFindTacletAppContainer

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.RuleAppContainer
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.TacletAppContainer
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.NoFindTacletAppContainer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<RuleAppContainer>
public class NoFindTacletAppContainer extends TacletAppContainer
Instances of this class are immutable

  • Method Details

    • isStillApplicable

      protected boolean isStillApplicable(Goal p_goal)
      Specified by:
      isStillApplicable in class TacletAppContainer
      Returns:
      true iff the stored rule app is applicable for the given sequent, i.e. always true since NoFindTaclets are not bound to a find-position (if-formulas are not considered)
